title: selaginella sparsifolia
intro: Selaginella sparsifolia, also known as the needle fern or spike moss, is a type of evergreen, non-vascular plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella sparsifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antidote for various poisonings. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
